blended.narrative: Powder King is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,702 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
